title: JENOLITE Stain Blocker Paint | WHITE | 400ml | Damp Seal & Stain Blocking Spray Paint | Damp & Anti Mould Paint For Walls & Ceilings | Immediately Block Stains, Mould & Mildew
features: Stain Blocker Paint : JENOLITE Stain Blocker Paint is a powerful stain blocker paint, formulated to work as an anti mould paint, immediately covering stains and marks left by mould and mildew on walls and ceilings

Stain Block Primer Paint: Our pure white stain blocker spray paint can be used as a primer paint and painted over, or left as the topcoat. It is ideal for immediately covering and blocking the reappearance of common stains, and also acts as a damp seal paint. Creating a strong barrier against persistent it works on Water Marks, Mildew, Rust, Nicotine, Grease, Satins, Soot, Crayon, Pen, and more

Mould Stain Paint for Walls & Ceilings: This anti mould paint for walls and ceilings is the perfect solution for surfaces affected by damp, mould and mildew. Perfect for high humidity areas, it penetrates deeply into the surface, covering and preventing stain reoccurrence

Multi-Surface Spray Paint: JENOLITE Stain Blocker Paint can be used on a variety of surfaces, including interior walls, ceilings, windowsills, plaster, cement, woodwork. Build up thin coats to achieve the best finish, can be applied to damp surfaces. Full cure 60 mins.

Long Lasting: The premium formulation is designed to last. It's mould resistant and a perfect stain block solution ensures your walls and ceilings remain stain-free. Perfect for high humidity areas such as Bathroom, Kitchens and Laundry Rooms
